most_people_never_ask_why_they_hold_on_y: Most people never ask why they hold on. You did. That kind of honesty is where real change begins.
come_back_whenever_youre_ready_to_explor: "Come back whenever you're ready to explore another." 🌸
every_entry_is_a_moment_of_courage_youre: Every entry is a moment of courage. You're learning to understand the emotions behind your things.
be_as_detailed_as_you_like_putting_it_in: Be as detailed as you like. Putting it into words helps.
write_freely__this_is_just_for_you_: Write freely — this is just for you. 💭
sometimes_objects_hold_more_than_things_: Sometimes objects hold more than things. They hold feelings we haven't found another place for yet.
what_is_this_object_really_holding_for_y: What is this object really holding for you?
naming_it_doesnt_mean_you_have_to_act_on: Naming it doesn't mean you have to act on it. Awareness itself is the work. 🌸
every_entry_is_a_moment_of_courage_revis: Every entry is a moment of courage. Revisit your reflections to see how far you've come.
your_journal_is_waiting_start_your_first: Your journal is waiting. Start your first reflection today.
every_object_you_keep_is_keeping_somethi: "Every object you keep is keeping something for you." 🌸
this_isnt_about_clearing_space_its_about: This isn't about clearing space. It's about understanding what your things are holding for you.
think_of_one_item_youve_been_holding_ont: Think of one item you've been holding onto.
eg_my_mothers_old_scarf_a_broken_watch: e.g. my mother's old scarf, a broken watch
when_did_this_object_come_into_your_life: When did this object come into your life? What was happening then?
what_do_you_imagine_would_happen_if_this: What do you imagine would happen if this object was gone tomorrow?
does_this_object_remind_you_of_a_person_: Does this object remind you of a person, a time, or a version of yourself?
what_does_keeping_this_object_protect_yo: What does keeping this object protect you from?
a_fear_of_not_having_enough: A fear of not having enough
a_memory_im_not_ready_to_lose: A memory I'm not ready to lose
please_name_an_object_to_start: Please name an object to start
please_write_your_thoughts_to_continue: Please write your thoughts to continue
